overall.description: A cinematic walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk luxury lobby from the video game Cyberpunk 2077. The camera follows a character in a suit exploring a high-tech interior with neon accents, digital billboards displaying changing years, and sleek modern furniture, concluding with close inspection of decorative objects and a control console.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury corporate lobby with large digital displays

events.description: character in black suit walks from left to right across the marble floor

agents.ego_description: walking through the futuristic lobby while panning right to observe the space

notable_agents.action: character in black suit walking across the lobby from left to right

entered.detail: massive screen displaying '2087' with futuristic graphics and red accents
highly polished dark marble flooring with subtle geometric patterns
sleek black seating with red neon trim along the edges
tall glass panels revealing city lights outside the lobby

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a spacious, dimly lit cyberpunk lobby with a massive digital billboard displaying '2087' dominating the far wall. The camera pans right across the polished black marble floor, revealing modern sofa benches with red neon accents. A character in a black suit walks across the frame from left to right, crossing the open floor space.

scene_state.functional_zone: staircase leading to upper platform level

events.description: camera turns left and begins following the character up the stairs
passing under bright linear ceiling lights creating dramatic illumination

agents.ego_description: following the character up the staircase to the upper platform level

notable_agents.action: character ascending the stairs toward the upper platform

entered.detail: elevated platform with geometric black design and red neon accents
bright fluorescent-style light strips arranged in parallel rows on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left and follows the character up a staircase to an upper platform. As they ascend, bright linear ceiling lights come into view, illuminating the space with cool white light. The digital billboard remains visible in the background but shifts to the left as the camera climbs.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper platform overlooking the main lobby

events.description: character stops at the top of the stairs and looks around the space

agents.ego_description: approaching the character who has stopped to survey the upper level surroundings

notable_agents.action: character standing still at the platform edge looking out over the lobby

entered.detail: tall decorative red vase with white marbled patterns
bioluminescent red branching coral decoration inside the vase

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the upper platform where the character has stopped to look around. A decorative red ceramic vase with glowing coral branches becomes visible on the right side. The digital billboard now displays '2077' and is centered in the background view.

scene_state.functional_zone: decorative display area with bioluminescent art piece

events.description: camera focuses on the red vase and begins close inspection of the object
camera moves closer to the glowing coral branch, bathing the view in red neon light

agents.ego_description: closely examining the decorative red vase and glowing coral branch from multiple angles

entered.detail: metallic red storage cabinet with vertical ventilation slats

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions to a close-up inspection of the red ceramic vase and its glowing coral branch decoration. Moving closer, the scene is bathed in red neon light from the bioluminescent branches. The camera circles the object, revealing intricate white marbling patterns on the vase surface and a red locker cabinet in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: console table with futuristic control device

events.description: camera moves away from the vase to focus on a table with a control console

agents.ego_description: examining the futuristic control device on the green marble table

notable_agents.action: character standing near the table holding a small device

entered.detail: dark green marble table surface with white veining patterns
sleek black device with holographic display screen and dome-shaped sensor

segments.scene_description: The camera moves away from the vase to a green marble table featuring a futuristic control console with a holographic display. The character stands nearby holding a device. The camera focuses on the intricate details of the console, showing buttons and a dome-shaped sensor on the sleek black surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit cyberpunk lobby that transitions from a wide architectural exploration into an intimate inspection of high-tech artifacts. It begins by panning across a polished black marble floor beneath a massive digital billboard displaying 2087, passing modern sofa benches with red neon accents as a character in a black suit crosses the space. As the camera turns left to follow the character up a staircase, the lighting shifts from dim shadows to cool white linear ceiling lights while the billboard recedes into the background. The scene then opens onto an upper platform where the billboard now displays 2077, before the camera glides forward into a close-up of a red ceramic vase with glowing bioluminescent coral branches. Finally, the view moves away from the red neon glow toward a green marble table, focusing on the intricate buttons and holographic display of a futuristic control console.
